subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! What thou didst write was noted. It brought glad-tidings of spiritual delight to the beloved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید بشارت روح و ریحان احبا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God
